case_title: C&C OF S.F./TAX COLLECTOR'S OFC/INVESTIGATION DIV. VS PLATERO, MARGIE

docket_entries.description: PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF C&C OF S.F./TAX COLLECTOR'S OFC/INVESTIGATION DIV. PETITION MAILED ON JAN 22, 2001
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,254.20 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $382.51 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT PLATERO, MARGIE
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF C&C OF S.F./TAX COLLECTOR'S OFC/INVESTIGATION DIV.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C&C OF S.F./TAX COLLECTOR'S OFC/INVESTIGATION DIV. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PLATERO, MARGIE $3,518.20 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,554.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PETSA SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR SIGNATURE. MAILING DATE IS 1/22/01. FILED IN COURT ON 2/21/01.
